description: Checklist for collateral ratio, liquidation incentives, partial liquidation, bad debt, and liquidation collateral transfer.
core_invariants: every undercollateralized position must have a viable liquidation path
liquidator compensation must be economically positive under supported position sizes
liquidation must transfer the correct collateral and update all debt/collateral accounting
common_bug_classes: no partial liquidation for huge positions
liquidation bonus lower than debt burned
exogenous collateral check blocks valid liquidation
check_items: Model liquidator payoff over CR, debt size, and collateral mix
Check partial liquidation support and max close factor
Trace all collateral movement to liquidator
Verify liquidation preconditions for special collateral classes
Test tiny positions and gas/incentive thresholds
test_ideas: create CR < 1 and CR slightly below threshold positions
attempt self-liquidation in same block as deposit
fuzz position size vs gas and bonus economics
